segments.note: Card slides up from bottom (~147.7), held & shown center - first clear reveal of the window.
New card pushed up (~158.5), settles ~158.9, held steady (gold/white player card) then starts to lower - flowing reveal+hold.
Continuous in-hand fan: dark chrome card rises from low (~162.6), then a yellow/gold-bordered insert/feature card comes up (~166.5) - kept as one flowing segment so it doesn't blink.
Continuous in-hand showing of the next several cards (white/silver player cards swapped in hand) - flowing segment.
Continuous showing including an orange/colored parallel that comes up (~177.6) and following chrome cards - flowing.
Continuous showing of dark chrome cards plus a bright-bordered card - flowing fan/swap.
Continuous showing of final cards including a red parallel (~190.4); ends when hands go empty/no card on screen.
